author: akaalias
description: This plugin is dangerous! When you start it, you have to write without stopping for 100 seconds. If you stop, think and look around, after 3 seconds the plugin will DELETE what you've written in this note.

manifest.author: Alexis Rondeau
manifest.description: “Elegant”, “Dangerous”, “Relaxing”, “Perverted”, “Your best friend”, “Your worst nightmare”. When you start a Dangerzone session, you have to write without stopping for X seconds. If you stop, think and look around, after Y seconds the plugin will DELETE what you've written in this note.
manifest.name: Dangerzone Writing

name: Dangerzone Writing

releases.author: LuccaHellriegel
releases.description: This version adapts the plugin to the new obsidian API while not changing the functionality.

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description:
## Updates
### Adds grace-period before text-fade starts
Based on @autonomygaps' feedback (https://forum.obsidian.md/t/dangerzone-flowstate-like-plugin-prototype/8776/40) - changes when fading starts: Fading only occurs in the last 5 seconds before deletion but not before.

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description:
## Fixes Issues
- Background-color and font weren't always re-set to their original state

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description:
## New Features
### Custom Immersive Writing Settings
- **Session Font-Size**: Increases editor font-size temporarily for a more immersive experience. Leave empty to keep default size
- **Session Background Color**: Changes background color of editor temporarily for a more immersive experience. Find a good color at [https://htmlcolorcodes.com](https://htmlcolorcodes.com/). Leave empty to omit

![immersive](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/111555/100867066-ee71ad00-3499-11eb-93f3-a9eeabf20098.gif)

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description:
## New Features
- Adds "fading" effect to help notice the urgency while writing (without having to look at the bottom bar)

![new_effect](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/111555/100791500-a01cc980-3419-11eb-8dc0-461e210a7cdf.gif)

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description:
## New Features
- Adds hotkey <kbd>Alt</kbd>+<kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>1</kbd> that allows to either
  - Start a new writing session from scratch (instead of clicking the button)
  - Reset the countdown of the currently running session to continue writing under pressure

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description: ## New Features ### Successful Session Count You get a +1 🎉 for every Dangerzone Writing session you complete successfully. "Successfully" means that once the timer is up, there is at least _some_ text there (indicating you didn't just give up and let the countdown finish). ## Thank you! Thank you, [AutonomyGaps](https://forum.obsidian.md/u/AutonomyGaps) for the idea of tracking your sessions.

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description: ## New Features ### Custom Settings - Adds custom settings for session duration (Default: 60s) - Adds custom settings for seconds-until-deletion (Default: 5s) ### Thank You and Disclaimer - Adds a Thank You section in the plugin settings tab - Adds a Disclaimer section in the plugin settings tag (in case the plugin eats your homework) ## Code Improvements Based on @lisihid's feedback at https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/70 - Cleans up spaces/tabs mess - Reduces reference to _all_ editors and just captures one - Refactors code into `src/` ## Questions, suggestions? Got questions, ideas, issues etc. leave a comment in the forum at https://forum.obsidian.md/t/dangerzone-flowstate-like-plugin-prototype/8776/ ## Thank you! Thank you ryanjamurphy, roberthaisfield, macedotavares, afokapu, tristanbailey, lukeleppan, AutonomyGaps and hicsuntdragons for your feedback and support.

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description: Updates the name from `Dangerzone Writing Plugin` to just `Dangerzone Writing` for better reading.

releases.author: akaalias
releases.description: Implements basic dangerzone writing session for 100 seconds with a max pause of 5 seconds before deletion.
